concerns.text: FR-007 ('System MUST validate that all cognitive assessment instruments... are standard, validated tools') is anchored to US-2, but US-2 focuses on statistical correlation of existing scores. The requirement to *validate the instruments themselves* (checking their clinical validity) is not described in US-2's scope or acceptance scenarios. This FR appears to be an orphaned scope creep or a mis-anchored requirement that should likely belong to a data ingestion/validation story (e.g., part of US-1's data quality checks) or a new story regarding data provenance.
